The '''J12 twin-pod airspeeder''' was used, and first produced, on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. City security used it for minor law enforcement, such as dealing with landing regulations.

The J12 was also popular during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], especially on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The two egg-shaped passenger pods were connected to the main body of the speeder by a flattened engine section.

{{Veh-stub}}
